title: gale hartwegii
intro: Gale hartwegii, also known as Hartweg's gale, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Gale. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Gale hartwegii are attributed to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which are obtained from its roots and leaves. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, and can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions.
intro_study: According to "International journal of clinical pharmacology research", gale hartwegii (also referred to as ginseng in the study) may have beneficial effects on health-related quality of life in menopausal women, specifically improving depression, well-being, and health subscales.
